evals.expected_output: A formatted markdown table of agents with Name, ID, Enabled, and Last Run columns, fetched from the Airtop API
assertions: Makes a GET request to https://api.airtop.ai/api/v2/agents
Includes Authorization: Bearer header with the API key
Displays results in a markdown table format
Shows agent name, ID, and enabled status

evals.prompt: Run my Price Tracker agent with url set to https://example.com/product
evals.expected_output: Resolves the agent by name, gets its webhook, invokes it with the configVar, polls for the result, and displays the output
assertions: Searches for the agent by name via GET /v2/agents?name=Price%20Tracker
Invokes the webhook via POST to /api/hooks/agents/{agentId}/webhooks/{webhookId}
Passes {"url": "https://example.com/product"} in the configVars field of the request body
Polls the invocation result endpoint until a terminal status is reached
Displays the final output to the user

evals.prompt: Cancel Airtop agent invocation abc-123 on agent def-456
evals.expected_output: Sends a DELETE request to cancel the invocation and confirms the cancellation to the user
assertions: Includes Authorization: Bearer header with the API key
Confirms to the user that the cancellation was requested
